emails.body:
AWS GovCloud Daily Digest - October 1, 2026

**Service Announcements**
- GovCloud (US-East) now supports AWS Deadline Cloud for scalable render farm management
- AWS Config advanced queries now available in both GovCloud partitions
- Amazon GuardDuty EKS Runtime Monitoring adds support for Bottlerocket AMIs

**Compliance & Certifications**
- FedRAMP High authorization updated for AWS Wickr (GovCloud)
- DoD SRG IL5 provisional authorization extended for 12 additional services
- CJIS compliance workbook refreshed for FY26 Q4

**Upcoming Events**
- AWS Public Sector Summit Online: Oct 15-16 (registration open)
- GovCloud Office Hours: Every Tuesday 1400 ET
- FedRAMP Continuous Monitoring webinar: Oct 22

**Security Bulletins**
- ALAS-2026-001: Kernel vulnerability patched across all GovCloud AMIs
- Updated IAM condition keys for S3 Object Lambda in GovCloud

---
This automated digest is compiled from AWS GovCloud RSS feeds and public announcements. No action required.

AWS GovCloud Team | aws-govcloud-announcements@amazon.com

AWS GovCloud Daily Digest - October 3, 2026

**Service Announcements**
- AWS PrivateLink support for Amazon Bedrock now generally available in GovCloud (US-West)
- AWS DataSync adds FIPS 140-2 validated endpoints for GovCloud transfers
- Amazon CloudWatch RUM extends to GovCloud (US-East) for frontend monitoring

**Compliance & Certifications**
- StateRAMP High authorization granted for AWS App Runner (GovCloud)
- IRS 1075 control mappings updated for 8 services
- NIST 800-171 Rev 3 mapping workbook published

**Technical Updates**
- GovCloud CloudFormation drift detection now supports StackSets
- AWS Config conformance packs: 3 new DoD-aligned packs released
- Systems Manager Session Manager logging enhancements for STIG compliance

**Training & Resources**
- New GovCloud migration workshop: "Lift & Shift for IL5 Workloads" (self-paced)
- Architecture patterns for CJIS-compliant analytics pipelines published
- Well-Architected Framework GovCloud lens updated v2.1

**Reminder**
Quarterly GovCloud pricing review completes Oct 15. No changes anticipated.

---
This automated digest is compiled from AWS GovCloud RSS feeds and public announcements. No action required.

AWS GovCloud Team | aws-govcloud-announcements@amazon.com
